methodology.combined_score_definition: min(bootstrap-2.5%ile pregame ROI lower bound, 2025) across the two periods -- i.e. min(pregame_2025_roi_ci_lower, pregame_2026_roi_ci_lower)

notes: lifetime PnL $-262,176 < fail threshold $-10,000 -- net loser across full trading history; category profit is noise inside a losing account, not evidence of skill

near_miss_rescan_meta.definition: stage-3 pool (positive full & pregame ROI both periods, BEFORE bot/stake filters) at relaxed n>=30 floor, minus the 7 main-list wallets
near_miss_rescan_meta.convincing_pass_definition: verdict OK AND lifetime PnL >= $1,000 AND (current value > $1,000 OR traded on/after 2026-06-01)
near_miss_rescan_meta.tier: SECOND-TIER: nothing here is promoted into the main list; user decides

failed_strict_criteria: criterion 1 (n>=50 pregame both periods): 2025: n=34 (short 16); 2026: n=32 (short 18)
